title: Errors triggered by between operators and column references
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT, c1 DATE, c2 VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 FLOAT, c1 BOOLEAN, c2 DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);
INSERT INTO t3(c0, c1) VALUES (3.14, true), (2.71, false), (1.41, NULL);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE (t2.c1 BETWEEN DATE '1970-01-01' AND DATE '1970-01-24') UNION ALL SELECT * FROM t3 WHERE (t3.c1 IS NULL);
key_bug_features: Inconsistent results from BETWEEN operators and column references
